memoryArtifacts.headline: Genealogy of the family of Miller: by Wilson, Larry M. (Lawrence Matthew), 1954- pg 129
Find-A-Grave Memorial for Joanna Scott 1515-1556
memoryArtifacts.description:
Joanna was born about 1515, probably in Suffolk County, England. The particulars of her birth are not known at this time. Around 1533, she married Richard Scott, who was starting out to be a clothier in Glemsford, Suffolk. Suffolk was the center of the blooming cloth industry in England at the time. They were probably married in St. Mary the Virgin Church in Glemsford. Joanna and Richard had nine children between 1535 and 1555, all born in Glemsford. Joanna died in Glemsford in August of 1556 and was buried on the 23rd, in the churchyard of St. Mary the Virgin Church.
https://www.findagrave.com/memorial/117506490/joanna-scott

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: Joanna was born about 1516, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. She married Richard Scott about 1535, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 23 August 1556, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in Glemsford, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Joanna est née environ 1516, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Richard Scott environ 1535, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 août 1556, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Joanna wurde um 1516 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat um 1535 in England, United Kingdom Richard Scott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. August 1556 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Glemsford, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Joanna è nata il circa 1516 nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Richard Scott circa 1535, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 23 agosto 1556, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Glemsford, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joannaは約1516年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで生まれた。約1535年にイギリスイギリスでRichard Scottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1556年8月23日にイギリスイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードで41歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクグレムスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna(은)는 대략 1516년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1535년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Richard Scott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1556년 8월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Joanna родилась около 1516 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Scott около 1535 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 23 августа 1556 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Joanna nació aproximadamente 1516, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Richard Scott aproximadamente 1535, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
